parameters.name: x-idempotency-key
parameters.description: Unique identifier used in HTTP headers to ensure that a request is processed only once, even if it is retried due to network issues or timeouts. See [authentication](/reference/authentication#idempotency) for details (UUID).

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the merchant's Yuno account. Found on the [Yuno dashboard](https://dashboard.y.uno/) (UUID, 36 characters).

merchant_entity_id.description: The merchant's own identifier for this entity, used for reconciliation.

national_entity.description: The type of entity being created.

number.description: The phone number without the country code.

address_line_2.description: The secondary address line (apartment, suite, etc.).

entity_detail.description: The detailed information for the entity. Provide either `individual` or `entity` based on the `national_entity` value.

individual.description: Individual person details. Required when `national_entity` is `INDIVIDUAL`.

tax_information.description: Tax identification records for the individual.

is_primary.description: Whether this is the primary tax residency.

issuing_country.description: The country that issued the document ([ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2)).

issued_at.description: The date the document was issued (YYYY-MM-DD).

entity.description: Business or organization details. Required when `national_entity` is `ENTITY`.

is_primary.description: Whether this is the primary tax residency.

beneficial_owners.description: The beneficial owners of the business entity.

tax_information.description: Tax identification records for the owner.

is_primary.description: Whether this is the primary tax residency.

issuing_country.description: The country that issued the document.

issued_at.description: The date the document was issued (YYYY-MM-DD).

ownership_percentage.description: The percentage of ownership in the business (0-100).

title.description: The owner's title or role in the organization.
